# Zenith Roofing Solutions

> Premium roofing services across Southern Nevada. Residential and property management roofing including replacement, repair, tile lift and relay, inspections, insurance claim support, storm damage response, maintenance, attic ventilation, and skylight services. Serving the Las Vegas Valley with 35+ years of combined experience.

## Services
- [Roof Replacement](https://zenithroofingsolutions.com/services/roof-replacement): Complete tear-off and premium roof installation
- [Tile Roof Services](https://zenithroofingsolutions.com/services/tile-lift-and-relay): Tile lift and relay, underlayment replacement
- [Roof Repairs](https://zenithroofingsolutions.com/services/roof-repairs): Leak repair and storm damage
- [Roof Inspections](https://zenithroofingsolutions.com/services/inspections-and-certifications): Professional inspections with photo documentation
- [Insurance Claim Support](https://zenithroofingsolutions.com/services/insurance-claim-assistance): Claim documentation and adjuster coordination
- [Roof Maintenance](https://zenithroofingsolutions.com/services/roof-maintenance): Preventative maintenance programs
- [Storm Damage Response](https://zenithroofingsolutions.com/services/storm-damage-response): Rapid response for wind/storm damage
- [Attic Ventilation](https://zenithroofingsolutions.com/services/attic-ventilation-upgrades): Desert-climate ventilation systems
- [Skylight Services](https://zenithroofingsolutions.com/services/skylight-installation-and-repair): Install and repair

## Service Areas
- Las Vegas, Henderson, Summerlin, North Las Vegas, Spring Valley, Enterprise, Paradise, Green Valley, Anthem, Mountains Edge
